section.heading: Salaries of Representatives, Delegates, and Resident Commissioners elected for unexpired terms

content.p: The salaries of Representatives in Congress, Delegates from Territories, and Resident Commissioners, elected for unexpired terms, shall commence on the date of their election and not before.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 37 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
